title: EmoteTweaks
description: A Addon for EmoteCraft to support sounds
body:
## EmoteTweaks

EmoteTweaks is an extension mod for EmoteCraft, adding additional features and requested tweaks for an enhanced emote experience. This fork extends support from Minecraft 1.16.5 up to 1.20.2, while the original EmoteTweaks was only available for 1.18.2 Fabric.

**Features:**
* Emote Sound Effects: Automatically plays wav files named the same as an emote's internal name when placed within the "emotes" folder.
* Customizable Emote Hotkeys: Define modifier key (Shift, Ctrl, Alt) combos for emote hotkeys.
* Shift-Canceling Option: Optionally disable Shift cancelling on a per-emote basis.

**Dependencies:**
* EmoteCraft
* SimpleVoiceChat

Credit to RyanV for the original [EmoteTweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emotetweaks) mod. Show appreciation to the original developer for their fantastic work!
